since_last: 42% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +0.50%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.08% · BTC +1.39% · Gold -0.29% · Nasdaq100 +2.48%. 42% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +0.50%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +0.50%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DV is the standout at +7.74%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.81% at $177.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.81% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
